---
title: "Theme Provider"
description: "Wrap your Ink component tree with the terminal theme provider."
---

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.vercel.app/r/theme-provider.json
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { defaultTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/default";
import { Spinner } from "@/components/ui/spinner";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={defaultTheme}>
      <Spinner label="Generating registry items" />
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

## Custom Themes

```tsx
import { createTheme } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";

export const oceanTheme = createTheme({
  name: "ocean",
  colors: {
    primary: "#0ea5e9",
    accent: "#22d3ee",
    background: "#0f172a",
    foreground: "#e2e8f0",
  },
});
```
